notes.en: [[stat:def%]] Main stats and substats (and potentially a [[stat:healing-bonus]] Main Stat on Circlet) can be considered at **[C4]** due to being able to heal the active character based on his [[stat:def|DEF]] during [[ability:burst]]. This is useful if you plan to use him as a solo healer.
[[stat:cr]] circlet and substats can be considered when [[character:gorou]] is using [[weapon:favonius-warbow]] to trigger the passive comfortably.

[[stat:er]] substats can usually be more important than getting the right Main Stat, as [[character:gorou]]'s damage contribution to a team is negligible, while being able to get Energy for his [[ability:burst]] is a lot more important.
